textByHash.0005b7d5e74793c61718ada640ce6b5295849237: For you friend, Artur is fine.
textByHash.2e3f960b1abde28fcdef33f7e34b9d29031b0927: I can command respect without using fancy titles, mother.
textByHash.bf0153f7fa4a54b61fe960aac67580e9905723ad: I have a lot of responsibility now. There's much to learn and not much time to learn it in. The loss of father still weighs heavily on me as well.
textByHash.96debacb1d2c2b1cca51997a33da9e721e3e8a20: Still, I am well supported by those around me. I'm sure that with their help, I can be the ruler the people deserve.
